pages.title: THE PULSE BELOW
transcript: CAPTION: LEGENDS OF THE RIFT · ISSUE #001
CAPTION: THE PULSE BELOW
NARRATION: A present-day Keeper touches an ancient tear — and the First Rift answers.

pages.beat: Present — Mira feels the pulse under Commons cobbles
transcript: NARRATION: Riftwild Commons. Dusk. The cobbles remember a scream the town pretends was weather.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): That's not a cart. That's a pulse.
THOUGHT (Mira Eggwarden): Compact law says invite. It doesn't say ignore the floor when it answers.
SFX: THRUMMM

pages.beat: Unstable ancient Rift at Commons fringe
transcript: NARRATION: Beyond the last honest lamp, the fringe still argues with the Fracture.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): You're not on any survey map. Good. Maps lie when roads rewrite.
SFX: RIFT-HUMMM

pages.beat: Vision seizure — pulled into First Rift memory
transcript: SFX: FWOOOM
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): —wait—!
NARRATION: The tear does not ask permission.
CAPTION: VISION — AGE OF FIRST EGGS
WHISPER (Unknown): Keep…

pages.beat: Elara on Fracture road with egg
transcript: NARRATION: Nine days before the Commons had a name.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): The egg is warm. That is enough to keep walking.
SPEECH (Stranger): Take the crown road — safer.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Safer for whom?
NARRATION: She shared waybread with a child who had lost a name.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Call the creature yours to keep — not yours to own.
CAPTION: CODEX ECHO — Waybread on the First Night
SFX: SHELL-SONG
NARRATION: Hearts were living cores. Stones are travel shards.
CAPTION: The Commons Riftstone is a fragment of the Prime — maps of places not yet found.
NARRATION: Farmers, healers, and Keepers gathered where stable paths still intersected.
SFX: KRRRAAAK
SPEECH (Child): Is it… looking at me?
SPEECH (Elara Venn): It is remembering the world. Help it stay gentle.
SFX: HATCH—!
NARRATION: The Soft Exodus had closed into eggs. Battle culture would come later.
SPEECH (Village elder): What do we call you?
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Courier. Keeper, if the egg agrees.
THOUGHT (First Riftling): …keep…
CAPTION: FIRST-LIGHT-01
NARRATION: When Bramblefox chooses a Keeper, the grove answers with green thread — Forest Bond, not a leash.
CREATURE (Bramblefox): *vine-hum…*
SFX: LEAF-SNAP
MAGIC (Grove): Bond accepted — roots remember both names.
WHISPER (Elara Venn): Softly. Bonds break when shouted at.
SHOUT (Village kid): It glowed!
SPEECH (Elara Venn): It agreed. That is rarer than glowing.
NARRATION: Mossprig does not charge first. It becomes the wall the egg deserves.
SFX: WHUMP
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Thank you for choosing the cradle over the chase.
CREATURE (Mossprig): *soft moss-settle*
NARRATION: Thornling's answer is growth with teeth — Sprouting Energy to trip cruelty, not crown it.
SFX: CRACKLE-VASH
SPEECH (Scavenger): Just a shell—!
SHOUT (Elara Venn): It is a promise!
CREATURE (Thornling): *root-snap*
NARRATION: Wisplet does not blind the dark. It teaches the dark where feet may land.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Stay with us, little light. The Compact starts with honesty — even to fog.
SFX: soft lantern whoosh

pages.beat: Emberfox Ashen Hide + Ashwing Kindled Spirit
transcript: NARRATION: Heat that guards. Fire that listens.
CREATURE (Emberfox): *ash-ruff*
CREATURE (Ashwing): *cinder-cry*
SPEECH (Elara Venn): None of you are weapons. You are the reason weapons can wait.
SFX: LEAF-SNAP
SFX: WHUMP
SFX: FWOOOM
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Hold the cradle!
NARRATION: Loyalty is a formation.
NARRATION: Mud took bootprints. The Riftstone took names.
SPEECH (Healer): We can raise walls. Or we can raise Keepers.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Raise Keepers who know which wall is a cradle.
SFX: soft dawn wind
SPEECH (Child): Will the egg leave if I am scared?
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Fear is allowed. Force is not.
NARRATION: That was the first Compact law — spoken before ink existed.
THOUGHT (First Riftling): …stay…
NARRATION: On the seventh night the Fracture roads rearranged again.
SPEECH (Scout): East gate is west. West gate is… soup.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): Then we walk by warmth, not by map.
THOUGHT (First Riftling): …warm…
CAPTION: Codex stub — Fracture roads
SFX: path rewrite… hum
NARRATION: A stranger offered a crown-shard for the egg — bright, legal-looking, wrong.
SPEECH (Crown courier): Name a price. The realm will keep it safer than mud.
SPEECH (Elara Venn): If safety needs a price, it is already theft.
SFX: shard reject — clink
NARRATION: Beyond the tear, something practiced patience.
TELEPATHY (Beyond): …who keeps the invitation…
CAPTION: SECOND PULSE

pages.beat: Mira jolts between vision and present
transcript: SPEECH (Elara Venn): If you are listening from later — do not sell the story's consent.
SHOUT (Mira Eggwarden): I'm here— I'm here—!
NARRATION: The vision loosens. The pulse does not.

pages.beat: Present — Mira finds carved deliberate mark
transcript: NARRATION: Under the moss: a mark that was not weather.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Someone opened this on purpose.
THOUGHT (Mira Eggwarden): Elara kept an egg. Who kept the knife?
NARRATION: Responsibility is not a crown. It is a walk you finish.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Hatchery Compact still holds. Invite. Wait. Tell the truth about the tear.
CAPTION: Theme — loyalty · responsibility · ancient betrayal
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): I will not make the egg pay for someone else's curiosity.
NARRATION: The First Rift was not an accident.
CAPTION: CLIFFHANGER
TELEPATHY (Beyond): We opened a door. You only named a town.
SFX: SECOND-PULSE
NARRATION: A pale moth drifts the lamp-line — archive weather, not a weapon.
CAPTION: Spirit Moth — cameo (TCG silhouette)
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Log it. Unstable ancient Rift. Deliberate tooling. Vision confirmed Elara's road.
WHISPER (Mira Eggwarden): And something still listening.

pages.beat: End splash — egg / pulse / next road
transcript: NARRATION: The Commons keeps its name. The pulse keeps its secret.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): I'm still inviting. Don't make me regret waiting.
CAPTION: END OF ISSUE #001 — THE PULSE BELOW
